readings.citation:
Ps 69:8-10, 14, 17, 33-35, R. v.14c
Lord, in your great love, answer me.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 69:8-10, 14, 17, 33-35, R. v.14c
Lord, in your great love, answer me.

readings.summary: As sin entered the world through one man, so through one man are we saved.

The Spirit of truth will testify to me, says the Lord;
and you also will testify.
Those who acknowledge Christ will be known to the Father.

antiphons.text:
The Lord is the strength of his people,
a saving refuge for the one he has anointed.
Save your people, Lord, and bless your heritage,
and govern them for ever.

The eyes of all look to you, Lord,
and you give them their food in due season.

I am the Good Shepherd,
and I lay down my life for my sheep, says the Lord.
